# Vane Data Documentation Index

Generated from docs/manifest.json. Routes are listed in sidebar order.

- /docs/data: Overview.
- /docs/data/quickstart/installation: Installation.
- /docs/data/quickstart/quickstart: Quickstart.
- /docs/data/concepts/sql-vs-python: SQL vs Python.
- /docs/data/concepts/udfs: UDFs.
- /docs/data/concepts/ai-functions: AI Functions.
- /docs/data/tutorials: Overview.
- /docs/data/tutorials/examples/common-crawl: Working with Common Crawl.
- /docs/data/tutorials/examples/minhash-dedupe: MinHash Text Deduplication.
- /docs/data/tutorials/examples/llms-red-pajamas: Semantic Search on Red Pajamas.
- /docs/data/tutorials/examples/querying-images: Querying Image Data.
- /docs/data/tutorials/examples/image-generation: Generating Images from Text.
- /docs/data/tutorials/examples/voice-ai-analytics: Voice AI Analytics.
- /docs/data/tutorials/examples/multimodal-structured-outputs: Multimodal Structured Outputs.
- /docs/data/tutorials/use-cases/claims-disposition: Claims Disposition from Multimodal Evidence.
- /docs/data/tutorials/use-cases/enterprise-agent-evidence: Governing Evidence for Enterprise Agents.
- /docs/data/tutorials/use-cases/multimodal-training-data: Building a Multimodal Training Release.
- /docs/data/tutorials/use-cases/procurement-compliance-audit: Procurement Compliance Audit.
- /docs/data/tutorials/use-cases/web-text-deduplication: Web Text Deduplication with Global LSH.
- /docs/data/deploy/deployment: Deployment.
- /docs/data/contributing/development: Development.
